message:
test(resize): expand restore_scrollback from 24 to 51 tests and cpu_pressure from 18 to 37 tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 46 new tests covering edge cases for scrollback injection (truncation
boundaries, UTF-8/ANSI-safe chunking, injection guard overlapping/empty,
CSI terminator edge cases, find_safe_split boundaries, serde roundtrips)
and CPU pressure monitoring (boundary classification, custom configs with
extreme thresholds, atomic tier handle state management, capture interval
multiplier monotonicity, serde completeness).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
